title: FormatBigUInt64 — packs into 8 bytes (setBigUint64)
description: JSON + binary (de)serialization of FormatBigUInt64 (bigint branded with the full unsigned uint64 min/max); the unsigned 64-bit bounds select an 8-byte setBigUint64 binary packing while JSON serializes the bigint as a decimal string. Samples include 0n and the uint64 max.
notes: Format-aware binary width: uint64 bounds pack each bigint into exactly 8 bytes via setBigUint64 (getBinaryByteSizes [8,8,8]); uint64 packing takes precedence over int64 when both fit.
JSON has no bigint primitive, so the wire value is the decimal string form of the bigint, restored to a bigint on decode.
